analysis_description: Round-3 tape snapshot at last timestamp (<=500000): Black-Scholes implied volatility (European call, S=VELVETFRUIT_EXTRACT mid, K=strike from symbol, option mid in same price units) and vega per VEV; level-1 spread width. TTE mapping: historical CSV day column d in {0,1,2} corresponds to TTE = 8-d days per round3work/round3description.txt (offset consistent with the VEV_5000 worked example). Method: bisection IV; vega = S*sqrt(T)*phi(d1).
used_to_decide: ATM cluster VEV_5000/5100 show similar IV (~0.22-0.24) and combined vega ~230-330 vs wings; tightest quoted spreads at 5000/5100 vs deep OTM supports treating them as the liquid ATM bundle for a straddle-proxy. Informed v1: use per-leg IV for fair and add IV-vs-realized-vol shock alongside price-vs-theo mispricing.

analysis_description: ATM-cluster time-series analysis across all round-3 ticks (days 0-2): compute iv5000/iv5100, RV, shock=IVavg-RV, delta/vega, and spread gates. Includes threshold grid over mispricing-edge and shock-edge.
used_to_decide: Found per-leg-IV mispricing is nearly identity (~0), so v1 signals are driven by IV-vs-RV shock, not price-vs-theo edge. v3 (pure z-score) was falsified with large losses due to one-sided exposure. Chose v4 as safer continuation: retain v1 structure, tighten spread gate and shock threshold, reduce clip.

analysis_description: IV shock (ATM IVavg minus short-window extract RV) vs combined L1 spread on VEV_5000+VEV_5100, all ticks days 0-2. Buckets on spread sum: compare shock distribution in tight (sum<9) vs default ATM (~10) books. TTE per round3description: d->8-d. Method: same bisection IV and RV scaling as traders.
used_to_decide: Tightest books (spread sum<9) are a small subset (~720/30000 ticks) with slightly more negative median shock; median combined spread is 10, so v5’s gate=9 still captures most near-median liquidity. v5’s slightly lower SHOCK and higher clip raised total PnL vs v4 in backtest without abandoning the ATM bundle thesis.

analysis_description: Per-leg BS Greeks on ATM straddle proxy (VEV_5000 + VEV_5100 calls, IV from bisection on mids) at last tick ≤500k per day: straddle γ (sum of call gammas), straddle vega, straddle Θ (BS theta per year, r=0, reported as sum). TTE d->8-d per round3description.
used_to_decide: ATM cluster carries large combined vega (~230–330 by day) and material negative Θ, consistent with straddle/proxy PnL being IV- and time-sensitive. v6 (lower shock, looser misprice) and v7 (tighter spread 8.5) both lost vs v5, so v5 parameters remain the current best; next iterations should nudge in smaller steps or hold shock at 0.055.
